objective: Define an order-sensitive, parent-conditioned, label-free support/OOD contract for deploying a fixed-PVRIG computational docking-geometry surrogate on the 7087-candidate design pool.
claim_boundary: Support V3 estimates whether a sequence is represented by the V4-D OPEN_TRAIN design domain. It is not model correctness, docking geometry, binding, affinity, competition, Docking Gold, or experimental blocking evidence.

forbidden_actions: lower the V2 coverage or null-control gates
overwrite the V2 implementation, audit, table, or receipt
use V4-D, V4-F, V4-G, candidate docking, or experimental labels to select Support V3 features or thresholds

reference_contract.exact_reference_rows_are_output_as: TRAIN_REFERENCE and excluded from deployment coverage

representation.full_sequence_esm2: L2-normalized concatenation of residue-embedding mean and standard deviation over the full VHH sequence.
representation.cdr_esm2: L2-normalized concatenation of residue-embedding mean and standard deviation separately for IMGT CDR1, CDR2, and CDR3.
representation.cdr_order: Per-CDR normalized Levenshtein distance plus exact canonical 2-mer and 3-mer cosine distances; no hashing is allowed.
representation.contact: The 12 frozen cross-seed-stable contact features, robustly centered and scaled using OPEN_TRAIN medians and IQRs only.
representation.distance_policy: Cosine distance for normalized embedding and k-mer channels, normalized Euclidean distance for robust-scaled contact features, and normalized Levenshtein for edit channels.
representation.same_neighbor_policy: A candidate is supported only when one reference sequence from the declared parent cluster satisfies every required channel threshold. Different channels may not borrow different nearest neighbors.
forbidden_features: parent identity as a predictive score

calibration.row_exclusion: leave the query row and exact sequence SHA256 out of its neighbor set
calibration.parent_balance: Each parent contributes equal total weight when channel thresholds are estimated.

nested_validation.policy: For each fold, thresholds use only the other rows within each parent; the validation rows are never used to set their fold thresholds.

domain_labels.TRAIN_REFERENCE: Exact OPEN_TRAIN reference row; excluded from deployment coverage.
domain_labels.IN_DOMAIN: Declared parent is in OPEN_TRAIN and one same-parent reference satisfies all required channel thresholds.
domain_labels.NEAR_DOMAIN: No IN_DOMAIN match, but a cross-parent reference satisfies all global diagnostic thresholds; not exploitation-supported.
domain_labels.OUT_OF_DOMAIN: Neither IN_DOMAIN nor NEAR_DOMAIN diagnostic support.

null_controls.cdr_composition_shuffle: Independently composition-preserving shuffle CDR1, CDR2, and CDR3 within a source sequence; keep its framework and declared parent; exclude the exact source row but retain other same-parent references; recompute ESM2 and contact features.
null_controls.cross_parent_cdr_graft: Insert all three CDRs from parent B into a framework from parent A, declare parent A, exclude the exact source rows, retain other references, and recompute ESM2 and contact features.
null_controls.channel_splice: Combine full-sequence, CDR/order, and contact channels from different source rows while retaining a single declared parent; the same-neighbor rule must reject unsupported feature mosaics.
null_controls.unseen_parent_chimera: Construct from two source parents that are both excluded from the reference for that replicate; evaluate only NEAR_DOMAIN leakage because IN_DOMAIN is impossible by contract.

decision_policy.failure_response: Do not relax gates or relabel NEAR_DOMAIN. Open a new version or add independent parent-cluster teacher coverage.
decision_policy.model_gate_independence: Support PASS cannot rescue a failed surrogate model gate, and model PASS cannot rescue a failed support gate.

publication_contract.receipt_publication_order: last, after exact output-set, input closure, null-control artifacts, and SHA256 verification
